title: Date calculation and comparison produce wrong result
poc: CREATE TABLE foo (dat1 DATE, dat2 DATE);
key_bug_features: Date calculation and comparison logic errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT PRIMARY KEY, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, duration INT CHECK (duration >= 0));
INSERT INTO bar VALUES (1, '2023-01-01', '2023-01-10', DATEDIFF(end_date, start_date));
INSERT INTO bar VALUES (2, '2023-02-01', '2023-02-05', DATEDIFF(end_date, start_date));
SELECT id, duration, (end_date - start_date) AS calculated_duration FROM bar WHERE duration <> (end_date - start_date);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bar WHERE start_date IS NULL OR end_date IS NULL;
